rules.name: Brute Force Detected
rules.description: Multiple failed login attempts from the same IP within a time window

rules.name: Brute Force Followed by Success
rules.description: Failed logins followed by successful login from same IP indicating possible account compromise

rules.name: Port Scan Detected
rules.description: Multiple IDS alerts from the same IP within a short time window indicating scanning activity

rules.name: Repeated Firewall Denies
rules.description: Multiple firewall denies from the same IP indicating persistent connection attempts

rules.name: High Volume Network Flow
rules.description: Unusually high number of network flows from a single IP indicating possible data exfiltration or scanning
